## Type of change

- [ ] New module
- [ ] Module enhancement

- [ ] Template addition or update
- [ ] Translation / localization
- [ ] Bug fix

- [ ] Other: _______________

## Checklist

### Content standards
- [ ] All new content passes neutrality check (no accusatory language)
- [ ] Trauma-informed principles followed (see `references/trauma-informed.md`)
- [ ] Safety gate logic preserved or improved — never weakened
- [ ] Crisis resources preserved in all safety-level outputs
- [ ] Educational disclaimer blocks present where required
- [ ] No fabricated legal or clinical references

### If adding a new module
- [ ] Module follows standard format (Purpose, Triggers, Roles, Safety Level, Question Set, Output Format, Quality Gates, Recommended Next Modules, Worked Example, Disclaimer)
- [ ] Module added to `references/routing.md` routing table
- [ ] Module added to `SKILL.md` Module Index
- [ ] Worked example included

### If updating crisis resources
- [ ] All phone numbers and URLs verified
- [ ] Date verified noted in this PR description
- [ ] State-specific resources clearly labeled
